title: Return Super Secret Settings (RSSS)
description: Mod retuned old mechanic minecraft super secret settings
body:
# Return super secret settings (RSSS)

This mod return old mechanic from version 1.8.9 super sectet settings.

In options you can find button super secret settings... If you click you can show 22 different shaders

![Super Secret Settings...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/465634a95f41f4ebb705bd25668456747169058b.png)

For example

## Exemple shader №1
![Exemple shader №1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2854edacbacddae5e406293d30448771a7318a77.jpeg)

## Exemple shader №2
![Exemple shader №2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd2746954d946180018936a9c7cb4bd9a14771ce.jpeg)

## Exemple shader №3
![Exemple shader №3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ada6ed391c3bba6a5052eddc36dcc09850a14f7.jpeg)

by hoprik
